payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark painted wooden fireplace surround with stepped, curved decorative molding and a deep black firebox opening; the right side of the surround is visible and the crop is partial/edge-cut, photographed from close range (approx. 0.6 m).
